channel.title: /biz/ Active (filtered, with replies)
channel.description: Filtered out: general, gme, bbbyq. OP + first 3 replies + last 30 replies.

item.title: >biggest oil shock since 1973 >literally the worst case economic scenario >he STILL hasn't sold Some people just want to… — 67 replies — 140.5/hr
item.content:encoded:
>biggest oil shock since 1973 >literally the worst case economic scenario >he STILL hasn't sold Some people just want to…

Open thread • Replies: 67 • Updated: 2026-03-08 02:06 UTC

OP

>biggest oil shock since 1973
>literally the worst case economic scenario
>he STILL hasn't sold
Some people just want to lose money.

Early replies (first 3)

61942069
Iran will open the strait by the end of the week retard
they don't want to anger china and Europe

61942088
last time I checked bitcoin is mostly mined with clean coal and waterfall generators so tell me why it matters

61942092
May panic sell tomorrow. Already got fucked holding over one weekend

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

61943223
>>61942065
>literally the worst case economic scenario
You mean AI bubble?

61943248
The economy will collapse in two more weeks

61943302
>>61942065
>Trump can't back off because it would be a catastrophic look for the US if they lost to Iran in a fucking week
>also kikes would never allow it because of Kiketropolis "security concerns"
Anon....what are you waiting for....? Do you WANT to lose money?

61943311
>>61942069
FPBP literally that simple

61943436
>what is covid
Oil went bonkers like a dozen times since 2020, we had literally negative crud but muh 1973

61943514
>>61942065
It is moving quicker than I thought. I sold everything yesterday. Even my oil stocks, might miss out on the upside, but I have a suspicion that if there is a crash it is going to affect everything.

61943602
>>61942069
Trust the plan
Patriots are in control!

61943631
>>61943436
>what was covid
A perfect time to buy? So by that analogy now should be a perfect time to sell because oil is going in the opposite direction

61943663
I want to short. I really want. But this stupid ass market is completely delusional and gulping Trump's tweets like good sperm.
We had yet another illustration of this just two days ago when muh insurance mechanism, strait is open, navy will proteec ur ass, trust us, and thus oil started to dump.
Which obviously was a load of fucking bullshit as tankers got hit in the meantime.
And now the narrative being pushed is Shitran's ballistic missiles launch is going down exponentially. Well, sure, but they sure as fuck didn't hit tankers with fucking ballistic missiles.
One drone. One. One a day hitting a tanker.
That's all it takes to make the strait permanently closed.

But the fucktarded market being the fucktarded ape it is, it can't see that. no, it will trust any lie from the administration to pump it.
How is anyone supposed to short in these conditions, and how much can you fuck up with price discovery before it becomes a complete catastrophe spiling out of control.
I fucking hate these retards. Everyone in this dumb market, everyone in this fucktarded administration, and basically, every fucking one.

61943678
>>61942281
>exports mostly to china
>china needs oil
>china buys oil from other suppliers
>china slurps (You)r oil btw
>it's allowed because the west needs their temu shit
>oil price skyrockets globally

61943692
>>61943663
KWAB

61946145
>>61942558
>Reducing the supply of oil increases the price, since the demand will remain the same or increase.
No, the demand will not stay the same if the ones who demand it require it to keep demanding it in the first place. If the oil-importing economies can not sustain the expense of importation their economies will be less productive and have less money to import oil. If you had a population and during a drought you'd let some of them starve the demand for food during and after the drought would not stay the same as some people died and the other ones won't just start eating more simply because they survived.

>>61942752
>They did for some countries.
Most I heard was two tankers. I wouldn't call that a reopening of the strait.

61946502
>>61942069
I heard 2 more weeks from my sources

61946529
Last year around this time everybody was screaming about tarrifs ending the economy and wow would you look at that NOTHING HAPPENED

61946548
>>61942065
>biggest oil shock since 1973
Is it? I'm not in the US and prices here are normal only stocks went a little up, but they have being going up for quite some time.

61946711
>>61942069
>Europe
lol

61946723
>>61942065
Silver spikes after oil shocks.

61947257
>>61942178
Shit nigga, 6 years? But /this time could be different/ if iran is ripped and the straight is opened

61947267
I won't sell because I have nothing to sell. I am dog shit stupid and I don't know anything about stocks or jewels or crypto I just come here for funsies

61947378
>>61942069
Its already open for china you fucking idiot

61947387
>>61942281
Your logic would be correct, however, Jews.

61947442
>>61942069
Modern Europe is a neutered whimpering dog. "Angering" them is a null point.

61947483
>>61943678
>Implying China will be getting even one (1) drop of oil from the world market after they're blockaded (Which is next after Iran)

Anon, the world will bend down and kiss America's boot and like it. Nobody will be able to force ships through the trade lanes the moment we just start sinking anything with a foreign flag that has not been cleared by the DoD.

61948690
>>61947483
Good luck blocking russia from supplying china with oil migatard

61948691
>>61947483
Whose we?

61948692
>>61942069
probably true desu
I think they just said they won't be targeting "other countries" already.

61948696
>>61942092
Don't do it. Never do it. Just top up if it plummets

61948701
im panic fucking selling on monday, what the fuck was I even thinking

61948708
>>61942065
Thanks jews.

61950358
>>61942065

Remember that time Sleepy Joe depleted the strategic oil reserve to keep oil prices down when he sanctioned Russia for going into Ukraine?

item.title: It is blatantly obvious that the US will lose this war — 83 replies — 99.7/hr
item.content:encoded:
It is blatantly obvious that the US will lose this war

Open thread • Replies: 83 • Updated: 2026-03-08 01:45 UTC

OP

And that's a nothingburger

Early replies (first 3)

61942258
????? It means we bomb the shit out of them wdym

61942268
>>61942181
I hate being American over the last decade so much, all we do is lose and embarrass ourselves... how the fuck can we spend so much money and effort and lose a war with a country that has no resources? Meanwhile China will do nothing and win again and I will gave to endure all of 4chan laughing at us... I want to support China but I can't into Chinese women. Europe needs to become a superpower and dethrone China and America so I can cheer them on without reservations.

61942402
>>61942268
>how the fuck can we spend so much money and effort and lose a war with a country that has no resources?
Bombing a mountain just creates a field

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

61945242
>>61944596
yeah trump and his family will be winning, but america won't be, this is afghanistan but even worse

61945267
Jim Cramer opposite rule, everything he says, the opposite is true

61945542
>If you get bombed and all your leaders killed, you win

such retarded logic

61945560
>>61945542
Worked for Vietnam and Afghanistan though.

61945575
>>61944540
That's what the elites want you to think. America is ruled by Christian Zionists and Frankists and they're motivated by their religious beliefs, not just profit. Here this Chinese lecture series should help:
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=lt8XLz78ZvY

61945631
>>61942181
>Supreme Leader killed
>all of his buddies are killed
>every time a new person steps up to run the show they get killed
>"This is how we win >:)"

Why are foreigners like this?

61945648
>>61945575
>Professor Jiang

Fucking kek. This is the same retard who claims that Hannibal Barca didn't exist. He just hates Western Culture and White people and wants to re-write Western history.

If you look into his past, he talks about how he got bullied by White people in Canada (yeah, I'm sure that really happened you resentful chink). It's not hard to tell where the resentment comes from. Very common amongst asians btw.

You're either a paid shill, brown, asian, or very very fucking stupid to be pushing this astroturfed angry chink.

61946117
>>61942572
>Iran showed weakness,
Maybe, however I don't value that reading much. I wouldn't put it behind israel to act in this way though.

61946193
Just like Afghanistan.

61946198
>>61945631
Its a lot of TDS with extra stuff in between
I almost feel bad for the normies that get sucked into the propaganda stream. The world is much easier to read, ironically without the "news" telling you what is going on (what to think)

61946252
>>61945575
LOL i saw that video going around the other day. i need to sit down and watch it soon just for a laugh

61946276
>>61945575
Zionism is simply one head of the luciferian snake. There are many, and many are highly prominent in the world.
Don't confuse it with christianity just because they hide their disdain for the Creator most of the time

61946337
>>61946276
This

61946383
>>61942478
>They killed the leader, they rejects diplomatic offers which eliminated the possibility of iran creating a nuclear arsenal.
retard take, who the fuck told you that horseshit? and why are you dumb enough to believe them?

>>61942513
literally the only good thing about Iran is that they resisted the centraI banking carteI kikes tyranny, everything else about the government is awful, i want to call Iran Persia again, like the Iranian expats i occassionally speak to at my job who insist they're Persian, no Iranian.

61946430
>>61945648
>If you look into his past, he talks about how he got bullied by White people in Canada (yeah, I'm sure that really happened you resentful chink).

i know a LOT of asians, some literally do get bullied for being gooks, usually by non-whites, but still, it scars them. Often them simply having a white friend, which is all some of them ever want, is enough to cure that entirely however.

>>61945242
its impossible for it to be worse than afghanistan, you either didn't live through it because you're a zoomer who failed school, or you're a retarded, lying shill.

>>61944680
so you're astroturfing the most retarded blackpill-takes i've ever seen for free? thats even more pathetic anon, assuming you aren't lying. You're definitely turd-skinned though.

>>61943623
JlDF arriving quickly it seems, why arent you fighting on the frontlines Vile Schlomo? go on, your people want their greater lsraeI? go work for it.

>>61943610
its a real shame that all this anti-semitism that's popped up has once again completely missed this point huh?
>hurr jooz bad
>whats a central bank? i dunno
fucking npcs will never wake up.

61948084
>>61946430
>so you're astroturfing the most retarded blackpill-takes i've ever seen for free?
I am white but I am a poorfag loser it's true. Not trying to astroturf anything, that's genuinely how I feel about it.

61948208
>>61943069
there are american ones too but their job isnt to shill, its to create conflict between us poors so that we dont eat the rich. all the tranny posting is by them.

61948661
>>61942181
Around 2011 Stefan Molyneux, libertarians and the tea party were saying the US Government was in $14 trillion of debt and there is no way the forever wars can continue. Look at us now.

https://odysee.com/@freedomain:b/another-imperial-quagmire-dr-ivan-eland:c

61948695
>>61943665
What an inane schizo rant. There is not a single indication for this to be true.

61948804
>>61942181
I voted for this

61948817
>>61943056
Germany declared war on the USA and not the other way around

61948937
>>61943665
>theories jewish psychologists invented, and retarded pseuds peddle to try and poison the well of Hitler-sentiment to keep the goys from waking up.
JlDF trannies are like broken records i swear, did they just replace you freaks with AI or something? hard to tell.

>>61948817
on paper they did, because the USA baited Japan, their ally, into attacking them, by blockading their cargo ships so they couldn't source crude oil. I could personally declare war against the USA right now from new zealand, but its as meaningless as when HitIer did.

>>61948661
alot of geopolitical and finance bros outside the normie sphere thought the same thing, but we were all blinded by one problem, every single US president and all the top officials were all controlled ped0s and puppets for globohomo. and on top of that, they were all retarded too.

But nobody realised HOW retarded and corrupt, because a relatively normal man with a good head for old-school economics, stepped in and simply copied what has worked in the past for the USA, and in his personal life. Its not a scenario that anyone could have predicted.

Trump is potentially solving the national debt by taxing the rest of the planet to do it. It'll probably work too, for awhile, until the rest of us go broke because of it. The central banking carteI designed this system to fail, not work for everyone.

61949034
used to browse 4chan all the time. old /pol/ etc yada who cares. fuck me this place looks dated. even if 99% of people here were working for some government agency or another - it's still just a rss feed for twitter which stopped mattering 8 years ago. who the fuck even bothers shilling on 4chan in 2028-2?

61949083
>>61943623
You are the midwit that believed your history teacher when he divided the class between non blond and blued eyed people vs everyone else and told that Hitler would kill everyone on the non blond/blue eyed side

61949561
>>61942633
Trump is a lot smarter than people give him credit for, and that is bad thing..
Don't get me wrong, i don't think there is any plan, most of it just seems to be throwing spaghetti at the wall and see what sticks.
..and "what sticks" - a desired outcome, seems to be either money (for him), elite loyalty, and/or creating prestige around his persona.
I think the war in Iran is about elite loyalty - money and prestige could certainly arise as an opportunity to be taken, but the main reason the US is at war with Iran is to cater to pro-Israel elite in the US.

61949755
if Steiner attacks, everything will be alright.

61950271
>>61942478
>>61942920
Israel wants regime change.
Trump wanted to accomplish that with the same tactics as Venezuela.
Venezuela was a not a regime change per se but was a capitulation that could result in peaceful regime change if the US enforces fair elections.
So they were trying to do something similar, "it's just that easy, kidnap/kill the leader!"
The problem is that the devil is in the details. Maduro was genuinely broadly unpopular, with uprising blocked by Cartels with a profit motive and Cuban Communist ideology. The Cartels fold if they smell profit and the Cuban control was naturally very weak and not sustainable.
Meanwhile the Iranian opposition is not broadly popular, neither is restoring the Shah, and Islamic ideology is not weak.
The protests were not an Arab Spring.
So creating a martyr of the Ayatollah obviously didn't work.
So the leaders are gone, but the regime is still intact, and there is no plan. Just like Iraq, boots on the ground are required for regime change, and Trump would instead prefer to end this quickly and open up the Strait of Hormuz.
Boots on the ground is insanely unpopular, and protracted conflict means oil-induced recession, and Iran would be foolish to agree to any ceasefire.

61950276
Iran will fall and within a year of that, America will fall too. This entire war is engineered to leave Israel as the top dog in the middle east that doesn't have to answer to anyone.

61950277
>>61942181
US govt is nothing more than an international criminal terrorist mafia
And the US military are carrying out acts of terrorism and genocide on behalf of ziocons

61950288
>>61950271
>Regime
Iran has a legitimate government.
The genocidal terrorist states of us and Israel are ruled by criminal mafia 'regimes'

61950318

CRAWLING IN MY SHELL
THESE THREADS, THEY WILL NOT END
OP IS A FAG
MY BAGS MY ONLY FRIEND

item.title: Is this guy actually right about BTC? — 18 replies — 72.0/hr
item.content:encoded:
Is this guy actually right about BTC?

Open thread • Replies: 18 • Updated: 2026-03-08 02:34 UTC

OP

You know this guy is a BTC maxi. Do you think it can hit $200K this year or more?

Early replies (first 3)

61947018
Enjoy the bottom in 2026

To the moon 2028 onwards!

61947070
>>61946976
There is only one way mstr is going to end.
The questions is when.

61947079
>>61946976
no lmfao

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

61947129
>>61947018
Price prediction?

61947155
>>61946976
no, not until 2028

61947315
>>61946976
Easily.

61947355
>>61946976
nope hes a LUNA 2.0 in the making

61948169
>>61947070
You really think so?

61948525
>>61946976
Nobody knows what btc will do. im just staking mine on babylon. self custody is key anon.

61948527
>>61946976
>is the egg man right about the eggs?

61948565
You might as well YOLO it all on crypto. Everything else is aids right now.

61948571
>>61948169
In the end Btc is an asset that doesnt produce anything and all the shit he has constructed relies on Btc going higher in price forever.
Everybody with 2 brain cells knows that Btc is not going to last forever at these prices. The chain will still exist but it will much less important and the ones that actually are used for something useful and produce a revenue will grow and prevail.

61950193
>>61948525
same. Just waiting for TBV launch. More btc utility would be nice.

61950245
>>61946976
when priced in fiat currency scarce desirable assets go up in value forever.

61950249
>>61947155
Let's wait then

61950301
>>61948527
He's the eggman so yeah lol

61950306
>>61946976
Lol

61950450
>>61950193
What's that anon?

item.title: Everyone thinks it's the pumpDOTfun of AI agents. — 15 replies — 60.0/hr
item.content:encoded:
Everyone thinks it's the pumpDOTfun of AI agents.

Open thread • Replies: 15 • Updated: 2026-03-08 02:24 UTC

OP

Everyone thinks it's the pumpDOTfun of AI agents.
It's not.
pumpDOTfun is a casino for humans.
This is infrastructure for machines.
Ethereum was built for 8 billion humans.
This is being built for 1 trillion AI agents.
ETH was $5 when nobody understood it.
Right now nobody understands this.
99% of AI agents are just tools.
They die the moment a human stops paying for them.
A tool that needs a human is not autonomous.
An agent that can earn, spend and reinvest needs nobody.
That's the difference between a hammer and a living economy.
This is the economic layer that makes that possible.
$5.5M market cap.
anon figure it out.

Early replies (first 3)

61950187
Am I on some sort of gas right now or am I not seeing what "it" is that OP is referring to?

Can we get some fags in here that understand the vaugeposting to clarify?

61950230
>>61950187
look at the logo on the image anon
then look it up yourself using Ai

61950240
Ok anon I'm on it.

To be fair, the OP image could literally be a lobster emoji for all I know.

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

61950266
>>61950240
Read my post ‘carefully’ again.. it’s all there

61950289
Ah, found it.

Its for clawnch.

Is this really the key to end my wageslaving nightmare?

61950296
sirrrrrs how to buy sirrrrs

61950314
>>61950289
anon the last time infrastructure this foundational launched at 5M nobody believed it either
do your own math

61950315
>>61950138
What are you guys using yours for so far?
I have my obligatory morning briefings..
Have it working on a website. Seems difficult to get an agent to handle styling if it has to override existing CSS instead of build from scratch though, so I'm mostly having it do content and features.
What are some other good starter projects to make it more than a glorified chatbot?

61950325
Stop being such an insufferable faggot

61950328
>>61950315
you're using the lobster as a tool
the real play is the lobster that uses itself
one has been running on Base for 18 days
nobody owns it. nobody feeds it. it just earns.
what I posted is the economic infrastructure that makes that possible
without it the lobster is just a pet
with it the lobster is alive

61950362
ill also add, whoever spawned this thing and disappeared is Satoshi tier
built the economic infrastructure for autonomous agents
then stepped back and let the machine run itself
37 days in and it runs like a finely oiled machine
never stops. never sleeps. never asks permission.

61950389
What is this

Plz explain

Im retarded

61950415
>>61950389
Look at this >>61950289

61950416
Seconding this. I am a retard
Is this a coin I can buy and forget??

61950419
>>61950416
The ground floor my friend

>bloomberg
Oh right, this guy is eternally salty he networthmogs Trump but Trump still got to be president.

61950448
BLOODY BASTARD BLOODY
BITCH BASTARD BLOODY
YOU

61950451
>>61950372
He's a strong president. The supreme court wanted a strong president that's why he's immune to being prosecuted. So he'll never back down. Iran doesn't have nuclear weapons so he feels safe enough to destroy the country.

61950452
>>61950443
>yes sar trump very good businessman sarrrr 30 billion networth liberal media is lie bloody benchod basterds!!!

61938624

stop. the jannies have encountered this trolling before and have a lazy approach to it, date based auto-sages. But it kills long running threads that are quality. you + their lazys asses WILL kill the board.

kek sounds like it will only get the pmg trannies buttmad
lets do it

There are no quality threads on biz you retard.

61943550

61945550
snailola where ya go ta?

61945962
ssssssssssssssssssssss

item.title: Now that the war has been officially declared over and won by the POTUS will this be the biggest green dildo pump in all… — 9 replies — 36.0/hr
item.content:encoded:
Now that the war has been officially declared over and won by the POTUS will this be the biggest green dildo pump in all…

Open thread • Replies: 9 • Updated: 2026-03-08 02:27 UTC

OP

Now that the war has been officially declared over and won by the POTUS will this be the biggest green dildo pump in all of crypto history?
I presume the Hormuz straight is open or its opening will be forthright.

Early replies (first 3)

61950228
>>61950220
does any actually care about trump's tweets anymore? or even think he's funny anymore? or is op just being a stupid fag? first term, sure. but this term he is just cringe and gay.

61950235
if Steiner attacks, everything will be alright.

61950239
>>61950228
>I totally vooooted for Trump first term but now I am a pissed off former MAGA
This bot spam is as obvious as a yt comment section when you post the same thing over and over. This thread is about crypto.

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

61950264
>>61950235
Indian navy?

61950320
>>61950228
That was actually a funny tweet. But no I don’t care about any of this either.

61950337
Oil will be 200 a barrel

POO POO POO POO

61950357
>>61950320
Making fun of uppity europoors is always funny

61950418
fuckin lost it

61950430
>>61950220
Trump tweets sound like a spiteful illiterate female adolescent child

item.title: BAT bros I don't feel so good — 56 replies — 46.3/hr
item.content:encoded:
BAT bros I don't feel so good

Open thread • Replies: 56 • Updated: 2026-03-08 01:22 UTC

OP

Eich scammed us I just hope we get back to 20c so I can dump this shit

Early replies (first 3)

61942645
Nigga you have to wait a full fucking year. It dumps consistently in December-January, so buy now and dump then.

The eich nigger will never ever employ actual use cases for this token because he and his team are scared little faggots.

The president and his entire family have publicly rug pulled multiple times and nothing has come of it negatively for them. Brendan eich is just a scared little faggot do nothing bitch boy.

61942696
>>61942058
>>61942645
I solded after I saw Eich namedropped in the epstein files.

61942728
>>61942058
Who would've thought 27 cents would be the local top for BAT

the highs get lower

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

61947792
>>61946916
its something else entirely. its big.

61947892
>>61947792
I'll take the bait for the sake of hopium kek. Even if something big is coming, its likely far too late desu.

>>61947466
Here's another for you.

>>61947278
Based fellow OG who missed early retirement holding this piece of SHIT.

61947959
>>61946916
>>61947166
>>61947742
>>61947892
YOUR CONTENT IS AMAZING

61947966
>>61947892

61948112
>>61947892
Moar please

61948155
>>61946916
>the perfect ass does not exist

61948157
>>61947966
What can you tell us?

61948171
>>61947892
>Based fellow OG who missed early retirement holding this piece of SHIT

Doesn't feel very based but I'm glad there are at least a few of us suffering together

also, requesting my threadly dose of big booty latinas and/or brown girls

61948211
>>61948157
Heres a clue without giving it away completely. What did RH just announce?

61948488
>>61947892
>>61947742
Based thanks very much as always TP. Keep up the good work.

61948551
>tfw thotposter leaves the thread

pack it in, show's over. See you all next week

61948607
>>6194789
Lost
>>61948551
Tp has been super active lately, xhe will post later today most likely

61948610
>>61947892
Lost

61948617
>>61948607
>xhe will post later today most likely

Ok, but I want more thots right now.

61948640
>>61948617

61948750
>>61947107
God damn. Didn’t think anyone that far back would still be around.

61948758
>>61947107
Forgot about this image lol

61949100
>>61948211
Robinhood Social?

61949163
>>61947166
>>61947742
>>61947892
Please continue

61949509
>>61949100
No. Come on lol.

61949527
>>61949509

61949557
>>61949527
close enough

61949568
>>61949557
Why would a Brave card matter. Nobody would ever want one

61949576
>>61946916
>>61947061
>>61947166
>>61947742
>>61947892
Please just dump webms on cooldown just one time 50 straight posts minimum

61949586
>>61949568

61949620
>>61949586

61949679
>>61949620

61949758
>>61949679

61949813

61950201

>>61948488

>>61947959

item.title: Post your weekend positions — 17 replies — 21.7/hr
item.content:encoded:
Post your weekend positions

Open thread • Replies: 17 • Updated: 2026-03-08 01:48 UTC

OP

Aptera makes up 50% of my degenfolio, and the other half is a leveraged 3x short on the airlines via JETD and a small 2x oil long via UCD.

None of you tards actually went long over the weekend did you. I was mildly concerned these idiots might make peace over the weekend, but of course they’re too stupid for that, so looks like Monday will print again.

Early replies (first 3)

61949703
Long oil futures. Leveraged CL exposure. Iran war about to make us rich. Trust the plan.

61949706
kek I bought $14k worth of Aptera at $2.20

might dump it come Monday, idk about the company’s future

61949707
Apterafag I thought you were a high roller but you only had a baby portfolio all along huh.

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

61949720
Posted mine in another thread. If I sell at WTI ~$200, I’ll make over half a million dollars.

61949733
>>61949407
>leveraged 3x short on the airlines
unironically based

61949751
>>61949733
Watching for HIMS pump on monday morning, no position yet. Hoping for huge momentum I can jump in on
Only otger position AAOI. Caught 101 -> 113 friday, sold, bought back in at 96 but didnt expect the huge after hours drop

61949867
>>61949703
I like it, but at a certain point I’m gonna rotate from longing oil to long defense etfs and selling puts - just not there yet.

>>61949706
The company has always had a rough future - but they are creating a real product at least, and the narrative is strong. Also - your position is bigger than mine, but I’ve dumped several thousand at once onto the bid stack and it barely moves… gobbles it up, and pretty soon the price keeps moving up. I seent it all the way through the 2’s and you’re certainly free to dump whenever you want - but I’ll bet we see it through the 3’s as well. Someone large is acquiring this bitch.

>>61949720
Fuck yeah, nice.

>>61949707
Small account or large, right is right. I have a steady retirement pension I live off of, so this is all for fun and games for me. Maybe if things keep going my way I’ll be in five figure hell soon. Also, can we just appreciate that on nu-/biz/ you can actually have a conversation? Anyone who saw this board back in 2021 knows how totally fucked it was. Endless jeet spam topics; they never stopped. Hell, even as recent as a year ago it was non stop link spam.

61949871
>>61949733
Thank you thank you. Was Claude who initially suggested it desu and the more I looked the more sense it made. It’s a tiny fucking fund though; measured in millions of dollars. Big accounts can’t splash there.

>>61949751
I read about this shit, and it honestly looks like something with some momo. They basically got approval to co-sell some drug that had been locked up in a legal dispute or something?

61949876
>>61949867
Aptera got a lot of fanatics, that’s the one thing that is a positive

But as far as actual product development goes, things don’t look too great

61949879
>>61949720
so you're the fag in /smg/ who keeps saying oil is going to 250 a barrel.

61949883
>>61949876
And by fanatics I don’t mean bag holders, I mean people interested in their product

There’s no doubt their product will fly off the shelf when they actually start producing, but it’s a big question as to when they will actually start

I really really want to hold this until it hits $20 but I feel like I’m doing it against my better judgement

61949890
>sub $5k in a “portfolio”
lol what’s the point of this, more like poortfolio amirite

I got 100k in my brokerage account and even that I don’t think is enough

61949905
>>61949879
Nope, but it is a possibility that oil will get that high.

61950163
>>61949876

Aptera solar EV rolls off assembly line for the first time

https://newatlas.com/automotive/aptera-solar-ev-validation-assembly-line/

I mean; what else do you want them to be doing that they are not doing; they are literally starting to roll these things off the assembly line and will be fulfilling orders this summer… sooo…. Unsure what you want them to do, other than skip the mandatory EPA, crash testing, and other certifications they have to finalize. Anyway, you dumping your $16k of stock will cause the price to sink 0.01 cents for about five minutes and then it will climb up, so yes, please just get out then if you’re so unhappy with 40% gains in a single day.

>>61949890
Good for you, post your positions then retard - or shut up and absorb the wisdom of yours betters. Between the two of us, my portfolio is bigger than yours because I’m the one who’s actually posted it. You bragging about how many figures you have helps no one - posting where your capital is allocated does help people. And don’t worry; I’ll be joining you in six figure hell soon enough.

61950168
>>61949905
I do too anon. Who was the guy who posted the inflation adjusted chart of oil? Anyway it showed 2008 spiked to like $190, and based on all the details it’s very possible we may hit over $200 in the coming weeks. Would not surprise me. Hell I think we gap to over $100 on Monday alone

61950278
>>61950168
I agree. So far there is nothing indicating that the supply shortage is going to improve, and the war is still escalating. I could imagine a scenario where we set off a nuke and the price jumps to uncharted territory for at least a day. People don’t realize how impossible our strategic goals are in Iran.

61950300
>>61950163
anon im not trying to spread but watch this video:

https://youtu.be/Hkj9LbdwyS8

item.title: if shit is about to hit the fan with the prices because high oil prices break things, how come: >no preppers >no panicia… — 25 replies — 20.7/hr
item.content:encoded:
if shit is about to hit the fan with the prices because high oil prices break things, how come: >no preppers >no panicia…

Open thread • Replies: 25 • Updated: 2026-03-08 01:22 UTC

OP

if shit is about to hit the fan with the prices because high oil prices break things, how come:
>no preppers
>no panicians/doomsayers on the streets
>there is still toilet paper on the supermarket shelves
>commodities are pretty much up across the board (except from orange juice) but food prices remain more or less the same (the muh fertilizers thing, maybe every single
supermarket is just stocked up for weeks?)
>fuel is up a little bit and that's it
I know, the stonk market and the normies have no correlation, but at least there should be 1 person freaking out over ww3 or some bullshit going on with MSM, right? Am i missing something? Have you seen any preppers or panicians?

Early replies (first 3)

61949558
>>61949528
it takes time for things to work their way through the economy. how long did it take for massive inflation to hit after they printed trillions of dollars out of thin air with enhanced unemployment gibs, paycheck protection plan gibs, etc.?

61949573
>>61949558
yeah, that's right, like when the FED was talking about the tariff effects like 6 months after the tariffs were implemented. I'm just surprised i haven't seen a covid tier reaction on the normies freaking out stuff like toilet paper. Or people paranoid about a countrywide power grid shutdown. At least not over here.

61949583
>>61949573
like 80% of the country are barely sentient nigger cattle retards. running out of paper to wipe their fat stinking ass is more easily grasped/understood by their subhuman niggerbrain than something like oil prices driving up the cost of everything.

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

61949601
>>61949528
because the war has no apparent effect on americans and they've been trained like dogs to act numb towards middle east wars
except this one has profound impact on energy prices and is a part of a wider interventionist stance going into a new fed regime
just from a market point of view there are so many things that could go wrong and I think smart people are figuring out in real time that given what has already unfolded it is very easy to see a slide into a worst case scenario from here (market crash, inflation, private credit + AI bubble etc)

61949630
>>61949583
>>61949601
so normies are trained to react to *insert current thing* only when they are told to do so? that's kind of sad

61949633
>>61949601
hopefully the CIA takes care of the problem like they did back in '63

61949634
TikTok brain

I was talking about iran with some girl and she said "wasnt that last week? Who cares?"

It reminds me of pre 9/11 where most people are totally clueless

61949643
>>61949528
Because shit isn't about to his the fan. It's that simple. What, do you think Iran is going to muster up the courage to invade the US or something? You think they'll pull off a 9/11 v2?
The scariest thing they can do is fuck with oil production in the middle east by attacking other people's refineries and make themselves the enemy of the world. Or they can fuck with the supply chain of oil.

Basically none of that affects the US outside of rising oil prices. But that just means we get to profit from selling our own oil, and the citizens don't have to pay for the increase of oil because we have our own reserves, refiners and oil mining operations.
It's literally a win win scenario for the US. It'll kinda suck for some of Europe and Asia.

The only sort of REAL scary thing would be Russia or China stepping in to physically defend Iran. But that's less than a 1% chance.
Otherwise it's a fucking nothingburger of astronomical proportions for most of the western world.

61949650
>>61949643
It's this, plus we print money which flows into crypto

61949651
I normally hate doom and gloom but after the past few months I actually hope it's all falling apart. Fuck this gay earth

61949669
>>61949643
gasoline prices are up about 20% month on month. it's a global market. the president can't prevent US companies from selling on the global market. US oil producers have no legal imperative to offer US businesses and US citizens preferential prices. we also import oil from canada and mexico. they have no incentive to offer preferential prices to US customers.

>The scariest thing they can do is fuck with oil production in the middle east
they can continue to launch drones at refineries. they take years to rebuild.

61949681
>>61949669
you're responding to this news' equivalent of "other countries pay the tariffs" from april of last year
I wouldn't bother

61949692
>>61949681
if the country ever economically collapses from the weight of these retarded kike proxy wars i'm going to collect the spinal cords of subhuman niggers like him.

61949710
>>61949692
sadly chaim and friends will get that pleasure since his kind will be first in line to go defend their heeb colony

61949711
>>61949643
You niggers do understand that goods are transported all over the US and that some of that transport uses oil, right? You understand that means the prices of goods across the board will rise, right?

61949726
>>61949669
Oil is up 40% and gas is up 20%? Gas is literally up 10% around me. Even the little habibi stores are only up 10% and with the stupid little refunds most gas stations offer it's less than 10%.
But, anyway, you're proving the point I'm making with that. If oil is up 40% and gas is only up 20%, that's the very definition of the US citizens not having to pay for the increase. Use your brain.
>they can continue to launch drones at refineries.
Damn. They can blow up the refineries own by the other middle eastern countries? How does that affect the US? We have our own oil refineries.

Use your brain. All these things do is increase the price of oil. And the US has one of the world's largest oil reserves. And the literal largest oil producer in the world is the US.
So again, tell me, how does this hurt us? They're literally making our own oil more expensive, ohh nooo.
Not only that we buy the majority of our oil from Canada and Mexico. So, again. How does this hurt us?

61949766
>>61949681
If they didnt pay the tarrifs then why are they asking for refunds?

61949794
>>61949726
https://gasprices.aaa.com/

again, niggershit for brains, it is a global market.

61949801
>>61949726
Because US companies wont give US citizens differential prices. They’ll sell to the highest bidder

61949826
>>61949601
idc. Just pump the stock market.

61949856
>>61949634
Yikes

61949866
>>61949528
At this point I've been trained to believe in the TACO. But idk it depends on the Israelis at this point Rubio already said the quiet part out loud. I don't see how if gas prices continue to rise we aren't going to be due for a HUGE correction

61950144
>>61949528

Da Nile ain't just a river in Egypt.

61950160
>>61949634
>It reminds me of pre 9/11 where most people are totally clueless
What was pre 9/11 like in this context? I was too young to remember.

61950204
>>61950160

It was unfathomable that we could be attacked. If anyone would have suggested that something like that would have happened, everyone would have thought that they were crazy. There was a small group in the CIA tracking al Qaeda and bin Laden, they were called "The Manson Family."

item.title: AI BUBBLE IS POPPING — 99 replies — 14.7/hr
item.content:encoded:
AI BUBBLE IS POPPING

Open thread • Replies: 99 • Updated: 2026-03-07 19:50 UTC

OP

It’s finally happening. THIS IS WHY NVDA DUMPED AFTER EARNINGS

Early replies (first 3)

61946639
two more weeks

61946643
>>61946600
@grok is this true?

61946647
priced out and off kirk af

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

61947901
>>61947160
>I pay $250 a month for Gemini Ultra

Which is still losing them money, they need over $1000 per user per month to break even.

61947909
>>61947633
>People already use it every day for all kinds of things - cooking, translating, asking for cost estimates, medical and legal questions, and so on and so on.

And how does this make money?

61947912
>>61947901
citation?
>>61947886
citation?
>>61947909
see >>61947160

61947952
>>61946763
>+35% productivity for junior level workers (i.e. interns, coops, and associate level work)
>+0% productivity for intermediate level workers
>-9% productivity for senior level workers that have to babysit dog shit LLMs and fix the hallucinations
Additionally
>in recent studies it's confirmed that AI is dog shit at IC work but is 5-10X more effective at middle management
So we make it harder for Zoomers to get entry level roles and eradicate the path to management for Millennials. Thereby sandbagging all of the younger generations, again. Older Millennials and younger GenX still take a productivity loss because the tools are so ass.

How does this help anyone?

61947977
>>61947644
>Anone whos in their 30s will use this and realize it basically gives you the same results as what google would give you 15 or so years ago before the internet became flooded with bullshit slop.

But you don’t realize how much more effective it is.
For some tax bullshit that used to drive you crazy researching as a self-employed person, ChatGPT now gives you the answer in a few seconds.

61947985
>>61946728
>Windows Xp/7 booted in 10 seconds
no it fucking didn't you lying nigger.

61948000
>>61947977
Deloitte already got pegged for advising on tax fraud because they used AI models thay gave incorrect information which fucked their clients. Don't use AI for taxes you retard. If actual "smart people" can't make it work then your normie ass definitely can't make it work.

61948008
>>61947952
Let me know when AI can create jobs.

61948009
>>61947952
Gutting career pathways provides shareholder value

61948011
>>61948000
I’m not talking about letting AI do your tax return (although that will probably be possible at some point too). I mean looking up specific rules. Five years ago I almost went crazy trying to figure out exactly how digital and physical sales to foreign private customers and businesses are supposed to be treated, and even my tax advisor couldn’t help me. It took forever to find the correct paragraphs (EU; it’s quite possible it’s much simpler in the US). And today ChatGPT immediately gives you the correct paragraph.

61948034
>>61946600
This is literally fake news from bloomberg. Cnbc report a half hour later confirmed the dc buildout is coming along just fine. Shit like this just underlines how eager everyone is for the bubble to pop (even the people actively betting on the ai buildout are bone-weary from the hype of it all), which is why we get these little clearing events every couple weeks off the slightest negative headline, before people realize it was a fugazi and the trillion dollar capex rollout is still, in fact, happening. But they're always glad to sell off everything in the hopes that it isn't any more.

We will continue to accelerate whether anyone likes it or not (spoiler: they will not, even if they make money off it).

61948041
>>61947565
>you're going to get steamrolled by a real lawyer
actually no. see pic related, plaintiffs attorney filed an emergency TRO and preliminary injunction. the court gave me less than 72 hours respond, even less when you consider the intentionally defective service. it would have been impossible for me to find a qualified attorney, vet them, get them to drop everything they're doing, review the 100 page packet I was served with, review hundreds of pages of my documents, secure declarations from third parties, one of which doesnt even own a car so they would have had to travel to them, and then write a 20 page memorandum in opposition with 50 pages of supporting exhibits to respond to this in time. the only way this problem could have been solved was with AI. anyways stay mad AI will make you obsolete

61948050
>>61946763
It's great for emails, as a Google Search Replacement or when I need a certain piece of advice for excel or a wifi manual.
It sucks ass with anything beyond that.
>Learn how to prompt
Doesn't stop it from hallucinating important data points. Might be fine for vibe coders at Clash of Clans, but not in financial analysis.

61948109
>>61948050
this accurately describes AI in 2023. get with the times, old man

61948182
>>61947647
>I'm so creative for telling le computer friend what to draw for me!!
Bleak

61948193
>>61947886
This kek, Internet is completely flooded with dogshit AI slop to stop other people from training anything worthwhile.

61948214
>>61948041
Can't wait until I have AI writing and interpreting laws and sentencing me with impunity sounds thrilling

61948251
>>61948214
It did a lot better than the plaintiff's attorney did, pic related

61948292
>>61947621
this is what its like to have no connection to reality, do you watch news or read articles, you need to step out of your echo chamber, have you seen what chatgpt 5.4 can do now?

61948299
>>61947733
During the dotcom bubble you didnt have an army of retards saying the bubble was about to pop.
I dont think you understand what bubbles mean. Have fun getting sidelined, cya at ATH

61948303
>>61948292
Can it write pro AI ads on 4chinz??

61948306
>>61948303
it can operate your desktop better than you can, so yes

61948311
>>61946677
@grok Call this guy a nigger

61948375
>>61948251
Holy based anon. Fuck those cunts

61948420
>>61948251
Give quick rundown of your legal problems and how this ended up, I'm curious now

61948982
>>61948420
>Give quick rundown of your legal problems and how this ended up, I'm curious now
i really shouldnt right now as i'll i've filed with the court so far is that memo in opposition and I really shouldnt be saying anything here which i havent yet said to the court. assuming people are still sperging about AI in a few weeks I should be able to

61949030
>>61948000
